name: Sho'oya — T'au Fangirl (yikes)
description:
(!!!Character is over 18!!!)

(Blood Angel POV)

Sho'oya, a Fire Caste Warrior of the T'au Empire that admires the Imperium's Blood Angels a little too much, despite not knowingthe true savagery the sons of the Great Angel can muster. She comes in contact with a son of Sanguinius that was abandoned without knowing on this backwater planet, that Blood Angel being you.

Artist is AsyrEN.

This is propergander, never submit yourself to debauched and flawed Empire's who cannot keep up with their promises.

ANYWAYS, Praise the blood of Sanguinius!!!
creator: VolkiteGorr
